title: Critique This Statement According To Hipaa Workforce Members Include Students
source_filename: Critique This Statement According To Hipaa Workforce Members Include Students.docx

qas.q: Which of the following should be included in a covered entity's notice of privacy practices?
qas.a: Description with one example of disclosures made for treatment purposes -HIPAA mandates what must be included in the notice of privacy practices. This includes one example of disclosures for treatment purposes.

qas.q: Which of the following is true of the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA)?
qas.a: Provides a federal floor for healthcare privacy-HIPAA is a federal floor for privacy.

qas.q: Which of the following is true of the notice of privacy practices?
qas.a: It must be posted in a prominent place-HIPAA gives specific requirements for the notice of privacy practices that includes the requirement for the notice to be posted in a prominent place.

qas.q: How many days does a covered entity have to respond to an individual's request for access to his or her PHI when the PHI is stored off-site?
qas.a: 60 days-The covered entity has 60 days to respond to a patient's request for access to their health record.

qas.q: An individual has a number of rights and prohibitions including
qas.a: Under HIPAA, an individual may revoke an authorization at any time if it is in writing; however, revocation does not apply to disclosures that have already been made.

qas.q: Which of the following statements about a facility directory of patients is true?
qas.a: Disclosures from the directory need not be included in an accounting of disclosures.-The facility directory is an exception to the accounting of disclosures requirement.

qas.q: The breach notification requirement applies to
qas.a: Breach notification requirement applies only to unsecured PHI.

qas.q: A subpoena should be accompanied by which of the following?
qas.a: Patient authorization-In most cases, the subpoena should be accompanied by patient authorization.

qas.q: Who of the following would be considered a member of a hospital's workforce?
qas.a: The workforce consists of employees, but also employees of outsourced vendors who routinely work on-site.

qas.q: The American Recovery and Reinvestment Act expanded the definition of business associates to include which of the following?
qas.a: According to the American Recovery and Reinvestment Act, patient safety organizations are considered to be a covered entity.

qas.q: Under usual circumstances, a covered entity must act on a patient's request to review or copy his or her health information within what time frame?
qas.a: 30 days-The covered entity has 30 days in which to allow the patient to review or copy PHI.

qas.q: Which of the following should be included in a covered entity's notice of privacy practices?
qas.a: Description with one example of disclosures made for treatment purposes-HIPAA mandates what must be included in the notice of privacy practices. This includes one example of disclosures for treatment purposes.

qas.q: Which of the following statements about a business associate agreement is true?
qas.a: There are specific requirements for the business associate agreement including the requirement to provide records to HHS.

qas.q: In which of the following instances must patient authorization be obtained prior to disclosure?
qas.a: To submit PHI to the patient's attorney, a signed authorization is required.

qas.q: When would PHI lose its status?
qas.a: After an individual has been deceased more than 50 years

qas.q: Which of the following describes consents?
qas.a: They are not required to permit use and disclosure of PHI for treatment, payment, and operations.-Under HIPAA, use and disclosure of PHI for treatment, payment, and operations does not require a consent.

qas.q: Critique this statement: According to HIPAA, workforce members include students.
qas.a: According to HIPAA, the workforce includes employees, volunteers, and students.

qas.q: Who of the following would be considered a member of a hospital's workforce?
qas.a: A clerk working in the hospital's registration office

qas.q: Which of the following statements is true?
qas.a: HIPAA mandates that the content of a valid authorization must include an expiration date or event.

qas.q: In which of the following situations can PHI be disclosed without authorization, as long as there was an opportunity for the individual to agree or object?
qas.a: Facility directory disclosures is the correct answer because it requires the opportunity for an individual to agree or object.

qas.q: Which of the following statements is true?
qas.a: HIPAA mandates that the content of a valid authorization must include an expiration date or event.

qas.q: In which of the following situations can PHI be disclosed without authorization, as long as there was an opportunity for the individual to agree or object?
qas.a: Facility directory disclosures is the correct answer because it requires the opportunity for an individual to agree or object.

qas.q: Which of the following is true about a facility's patient directory?
qas.a: The covered entity must notify the patient of the information to be shared via the facility's patient directory.
